entity.label: Azariah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Oded, a remarkable prophet in the days of Asa (2 Chr. 15:1). He stirred up the king and the people to a great national reformation.

nodes.label: Azariah
nodes.description: The son of Oded, a remarkable prophet in the days of Asa (2 Chr. 15:1). He stirred up the king and the people to a great national reformation.

verses.text: And the Spirit of God came upon Azariah the son of Oded:
